social_proof.label: Trusted by organisers across the Netherlands

features.title: Everything you need
features.routing_desc: My biggest frustration: guests ending up with the same tablemates three times in a row. The algorithm now automatically ensures everyone meets as many new people as possible — dietary requirements included.
features.envelopes_desc: The best idea I ever had: guests receive a sealed envelope with the next address at each course. The route stays a surprise. Now you can print them with a single click.
features.participants_desc: Who's vegetarian? Who has a nut allergy? Who can't make the main course? I used to forget something every time. Now you record everything per participant — partner included.
features.dragdrop_desc: Sometimes you want to tweak things manually — those two neighbours shouldn't be at the same table, or perhaps the new residents should sit together. Drag guests between tables and see the effect instantly.
features.overview_desc: Every host wants to know: who's coming, and how many? You can send this overview straight away — saves a lot of last-minute messages on the day itself.
features.drinks_desc: The first time I forgot to include the pre-dinner drinks in my plan. Never again: set a central location and the planner automatically factors it into the schedule.

how_it_works.title: Done in 4 steps
how_it_works.subtitle: What used to take me an entire evening now takes half an hour. Four steps, done.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Set up the course structure: which courses are there, who hosts the pre/after-party drinks, and how many guests per table.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Add participants with name, address, dietary requirements and availability. Or import via an Excel template.
how_it_works.step3_desc: The planner automatically calculates the optimal seating arrangement. Afterwards, make manual adjustments via drag & drop if needed.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Print the envelope cards and the overview. Ready to enjoy a successful running dinner!

testimonials.title: What organisers say
testimonials.quote1: "Planning our neighbourhood running dinner used to take an entire evening. Now I'm done in 20 minutes. Fantastic!"
testimonials.quote2: "The envelope cards are a brilliant idea. The surprise of discovering the next address makes the event even more fun."
testimonials.quote3: "Finally a tool that accounts for dietary requirements and allergies. A must-have for any running dinner organiser."

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: I didn't want to pay a lot for a tool I only use a few times a year either. So: €5 per year, unlimited planning.
pricing.feature6: ✓ Save participants as a fixed group
pricing.feature7: ✓ Payment via iDEAL, credit card or SEPA
pricing.note: Instant access after payment. Invoice sent by email.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: A running dinner (also known as a progressive dinner or safari supper) is a social event where participants eat each course at a different host's home. That way, everyone meets new people in a relaxed atmosphere.
faq.q2: How many participants can I add?
faq.a2: There is no hard limit. The planner works optimally with 12 to 120 participants, which covers most running dinner events.
faq.a3: The planner uses a smart algorithm that minimises overlap in tablemates. Each participant meets the widest possible variety of fellow guests throughout the evening.
faq.q4: Can I import participants from Excel?
faq.a4: Yes! You can download an Excel template with all columns (name, address, dietary requirements, availability, etc.), fill it in and import it. Saves a lot of time.
faq.q5: How do the envelope cards work?
faq.a5: For each table, a card is printed per course with the next address. Guests may only open the envelope at the end of the course — so the route stays a surprise until the very last moment.
faq.q6: How long is my subscription valid?
faq.a6: Your subscription is valid for 1 year from the payment date. You can easily renew it afterwards.
faq.a7: You can pay via iDEAL, credit card (Visa/Mastercard) or SEPA direct debit. After payment you'll immediately receive an invoice by email.
faq.a8: Your account details (email, password) are stored securely. The participant information you enter in the planner is not stored permanently — that data only lives in your browser session.

onboarding.step1_body: Pick a date, a name, and which courses you want (aperitif, starter, main, dessert, digestif). Click "To participants" when ready.
onboarding.step2_body: Add participants manually, import via Excel, or use "Load sample data" (?dev in URL) to test quickly. Include dietary preferences where possible.
onboarding.step3_body: The planner assigns tables automatically, taking dietary needs, availability and preferences into account. You can still adjust by hand afterwards.
onboarding.step4_body: Print per-person routes or envelope cards for a table surprise. Save your planning as a snapshot to revisit later.

contact.title: Contact & Company details
contact.intro: runningdinner.app is a service of VMH B.V.
contact.vat_note: All prices listed on this website are inclusive of VAT under applicable rates. Within the EU we use the One-Stop Shop (OSS) scheme, which applies the local VAT rate of the customer's country.
contact.contact_form_text: For general questions you can also use the contact form on the homepage. We usually reply within one business day.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.controller: Controller: VMH B.V., Hanekerweg 4, 7381 AM Klarenbeek, the Netherlands (KVK 08142482). Contact: info@runningdinner.app.
privacy.dpo_note: VMH B.V. has not appointed a Data Protection Officer because the criteria of article 37 GDPR do not apply (no large-scale or regular monitoring of data subjects). For privacy-related questions, contact us directly at info@runningdinner.app.
privacy.data_intro: When you use runningdinner.app we process the following personal data:
privacy.data_account: Account data: name, email address, password (hashed), language preference, country. Providing an email address is required to create an account and deliver the service — without these details we cannot enter into an agreement.
privacy.data_payment: Payment data: processed via Mollie. We only store the invoice number, amount, VAT scheme and a Mollie reference. Card and bank details stay with Mollie.
privacy.data_event: Event data: names, addresses and preferences of participants you enter as an organiser. Stored in our database until you delete them or close your account.
privacy.data_special: Special categories of personal data: dietary wishes and allergies of participants may contain health data (article 9 GDPR). These are processed solely on the basis of the explicit consent of the relevant participant (art. 9(2)(a) GDPR), which you as organiser must obtain before entering the data.
privacy.data_logs: Access logs: IP address, timestamp, user-agent — strictly for security, kept 30 days.
privacy.data_analytics: Analytics: via self-hosted Plausible (cookieless). IP addresses are pseudonymised with a daily-rotating hash-salt. No Google Analytics.
privacy.data_comms: Communication: transactional emails (welcome, invoice, password reset, renewal reminder) via Brevo.
privacy.purpose_service: Performance of the contract (your subscription, the planner)
privacy.purpose_invoicing: Invoicing, VAT filing and tax retention
privacy.interest_weighing: For the "legitimate interest" basis we use pseudonymised usage statistics via Plausible to improve the service. The impact on your privacy is minimal: no cookies are placed and IP addresses are hashed daily. We have documented this balancing test and it is available on request.
privacy.transfer_text: We aim to process all data within the European Economic Area (EEA). For Cloudflare, Inc. and Zoho Corporation, incidental support-related access from countries outside the EEA may occur. For those transfers we rely on the Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) of the European Commission as appropriate safeguards under article 46(2) GDPR. Mollie, Brevo, Hetzner and Plausible process exclusively within the EEA.
privacy.automated_text: We do not take decisions based on fully automated processing that have legal effects on you. No profiling takes place.
privacy.processor_text: When you as the organiser enter names and email addresses of participants, you yourself are processing personal data. VMH B.V. acts as a processor in that relationship. As organiser you are the data controller and responsible for a lawful basis (e.g. consent from your participants).
privacy.retention_heading: How long do we keep your data?
privacy.retention_account: Account data: as long as your account is active + 12 months after closure.
privacy.retention_events: Event data: automatic deletion 90 days after the event, or earlier on request.
privacy.processors_intro: We only share your data with the following processors, under a data-processing agreement:
privacy.processor_mollie: Mollie B.V. (NL) — payment processing; receives your email and payment data.
privacy.processor_brevo: Brevo (FR) — email delivery; receives email address and message content.
privacy.processor_zoho: Zoho Books (EU data centre) — invoicing and bookkeeping.
privacy.processor_cloudflare: Cloudflare (EU routing) — DNS, caching and email routing.
privacy.processor_plausible: Plausible Analytics (self-hosted) — website statistics; no cookies, no personal data.
privacy.no_selling: We never sell your data to third parties.
privacy.rights_intro: Under the GDPR you have the right to:
privacy.right_delete: Have your data erased ("right to be forgotten"), except where statutory retention obligations apply (e.g. invoice data for 7 years under art. 52 AWR);
privacy.right_portable: Data portability (JSON export via your profile);
privacy.right_object: Object to processing based on legitimate interest;
privacy.right_withdraw: Withdraw your consent at any time, for processing based on consent (such as the newsletter). Withdrawal does not affect processing that has already taken place.
privacy.rights_how: You can send requests to info@runningdinner.app. We respond within 30 days. You can also export your data or delete your account directly from your profile page. Backups are kept 30 days; after a deletion request your data will also be removed from backups after this period.
privacy.complaints_text: Do you have a complaint about how we process your personal data? You can file a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority via autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl.

terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.intro: VMH B.V. uses two sets of terms, depending on who takes the Running Dinner Planner service. Business users are governed by the NL Digital Terms. Consumers are governed by our SaaS usage terms. Both are available below as PDF — in Dutch and English.
terms.b2b_text: All agreements with entrepreneurs, organisations and legal entities are governed by the NL Digital Terms, version 2025. NL Digital is the industry association for the digital sector in the Netherlands (www.nldigital.nl).
terms.b2c_text: Contracts with consumers (natural persons acting outside their trade, business, craft or profession) are governed by our SaaS usage terms. See also our page on the right of withdrawal.
terms.additional_intro: The following provisions apply in addition to the applicable terms above:
terms.subscription_duration: The subscription is entered into for a period of one year.
terms.subscription_payment: Payment is made upfront via the available payment methods (Mollie).
terms.subscription_renewal: Automatic renewal is opt-in. You can disable it at any time via your profile.
terms.subscription_vat: All listed prices include VAT at applicable rates (OSS scheme within the EU).
terms.law_dutch: Dutch law applies to all agreements.
terms.law_court: Disputes shall be submitted to the competent court in the Gelderland district, unless mandatory law prescribes a different court.
terms.contact_text: For questions about these terms, contact us via info@runningdinner.app or through the company details page. Our privacy policy and right of withdrawal information are integral parts of these terms.

waiver.title: Right of withdrawal
waiver.applies_heading: Does the right of withdrawal apply to runningdinner.app?
waiver.applies_text: Consumers (individuals) generally have the right to cancel a distance contract within 14 days without stating any reason, under the EU Consumer Rights Directive implementation. The 14-day period starts on the day you conclude the agreement — that is the moment your payment has been confirmed by our payment processor Mollie.
waiver.exception_heading: Exception for digital services activated immediately
waiver.exception_text: An exception applies to digital services such as runningdinner.app: if you as a consumer have expressly consented to immediate performance of the contract and acknowledged that you thereby lose your right of withdrawal, the right lapses the moment the service is actually started. This is in line with article 6:230p(e) Dutch Civil Code and the EU Consumer Rights Directive (2011/83/EU).
waiver.checkout_intro: When completing your subscription on runningdinner.app:
waiver.checkout_consent: you expressly consent to immediate activation of your account;
waiver.checkout_understand: you acknowledge that you thereby waive the right of withdrawal as referred to in article 6:230p(e) Dutch Civil Code.
waiver.practice_heading: What does this mean in practice?
waiver.practice_text: Once your account has been activated and you can use runningdinner.app, the right of withdrawal no longer applies. This is in line with the current EU Consumer Rights Directive.
waiver.callout_text: Do you still want to exercise the right of withdrawal? This is only possible if you did not consent to immediate activation at checkout. Send an email to info@runningdinner.app within 14 days of entering the contract, with subject WITHDRAWAL, or use the model form (PDF).
waiver.refund_heading: Refund if the right of withdrawal is exercised
waiver.refund_text: If the right of withdrawal is validly exercised (before your account is activated, within 14 days of entering the contract), we will refund the amount paid within 14 days using the same payment method you used for the purchase. No additional costs are charged.
waiver.business_text: Entrepreneurs and organisations who use runningdinner.app in the course of their business or profession cannot invoke the right of withdrawal. Those agreements are governed exclusively by the Terms & Conditions of VMH B.V.
waiver.questions_text: Do you have questions about your subscription or about the applicability of the right of withdrawal? Contact us at info@runningdinner.app.

cookies.title: Cookie statement
cookies.intro: runningdinner.app makes minimal use of cookies. We do not place any tracking, advertising or profiling cookies.
cookies.purpose_session: Keeping you signed in during the session
cookies.retention_session: Session (removed on browser close) / 30 days if "remember me"
cookies.analytics_text: For website statistics we use Plausible Analytics — a privacy-friendly tool that sets no cookies and processes no personal data. Plausible is self-hosted inside the EU. See plausible.io/data-policy for details.
cookies.banner_text: Because we place only strictly functional cookies, a cookie banner is not legally required. We do list the cookies used transparently in this statement.
cookies.questions_text: Questions about cookies or our privacy policy? Contact us at info@runningdinner.app or read our privacy policy.

clubs.seo_title: Running Dinner for Lions, Rotary & Kiwanis | €5/year
clubs.seo_description: Professionalise your service club's fundraising running dinner. Less admin, more time for the cause. €5/year, unlimited events. Built by an organiser.
clubs.title: Professionalise your running dinner as a fundraising event
clubs.subtitle: Your events committee spends less time on logistics and more time on the cause. One cup of coffee per year — organise unlimited events.
clubs.trust: Built by an organiser who chaired fundraisers every year — the tool solves the problems I had myself.
clubs.benefit1_text: No more spreadsheet marathons. The planner handles matchmaking, routes and envelopes on its own — you click "generate" and it's done.
clubs.benefit2_text: A progress bar at the entrance, a direct link for participants — raise the proceeds for your chosen cause visibly and measurably.
clubs.benefit3_text: Once a year €5 for the whole club. Different chair next year? Share or transfer the login — no hassle with per-person licences.
clubs.benefit4_text: Less worry about the guest with a nut allergy or the vegetarian — every host automatically gets an overview of what their table wants to eat.
clubs.benefit5_title: Routes as part of the event
clubs.benefit5_text: Participants receive their route in a sealed envelope — the surprise stays, and so does the logistics. Unique for a service club dinner.
clubs.benefit6_text: Your club logo appears on participant pages and emails. It feels like a real club event, not a generic tool.
clubs.quote: "The events committee has saved two full weekends. Proceeds rose by 35% because we could make the donation page visible to participants."
clubs.pricing_subtitle: No tiers, no add-ons. One club subscription, unlimited events.

verenigingen.seo_description: Organise a running dinner for your student society, sports club or neighbourhood association. No endless WhatsApp groups or spreadsheets. €5/year.
verenigingen.badge: For student societies, sports clubs & neighbourhoods
verenigingen.title: The easiest way to organise your running dinner
verenigingen.subtitle: Without endless WhatsApp groups, without anyone losing an evening to Excel. Pick the courses, enter the participants, done.
verenigingen.benefit1_title: From zero to ready in half an hour
verenigingen.benefit1_text: Enter, generate, print. You can actually enjoy the next drinks night yourself — no more meetings to revisit who's eating with whom.
verenigingen.benefit2_title: Everyone meets as many new people as possible
verenigingen.benefit2_text: At an introductory running dinner, that's the whole point. The algorithm makes sure you don't end up with the same clubmates three times, while accounting for dietary needs.
verenigingen.benefit3_text: Never forget that vegetarian or the lactose-intolerant guest again. Hosts see per course who's coming and what they (don't) want to eat.
verenigingen.benefit4_text: Once a year €5 for your whole club — run one each semester, twice a year, or for your anniversary. No extra costs per event.
verenigingen.pricing_title: About the price of a portion of chips
verenigingen.pricing_subtitle: For a whole club. For a whole year.

vrienden.seo_description: Organise a running dinner with your friends, neighbours or family. The most fun dinner of the year — without spreadsheets. €5 per year.
vrienden.title: The most fun dinner of the year — without spreadsheets
vrienden.subtitle: One evening, three courses, everyone at a different location and new company at each course. You're the host — we sort out who goes where.
vrienden.benefit1_title: Perfect for weddings, birthdays and hen & stag parties
vrienden.benefit1_text: More original than a regular dinner, less work than you'd think. The surprise lies in who joins each course — and that's exactly what makes the evening unforgettable.
vrienden.benefit2_title: Everyone gets their route on their phone
vrienden.benefit2_text: Or in a sealed envelope if you want to keep the surprise. Hosts receive an overview of who's coming and what to expect.
vrienden.benefit3_title: One year for one evening? No — unlimited
vrienden.benefit3_text: Pay once, all running dinners of the year covered. Run three straight away: for the summer, the Christmas dinner, and your friend group's anniversary.
vrienden.benefit4_text: Share a single link in your WhatsApp group, participants sign up themselves with dietary needs. No fuss collecting addresses.
vrienden.pricing_title: Less than one meal, for all the meals of the year
